name: Monkey Bread III
recipeIngredient: Handful nuts (such as walnuts or pecans)
3 5/8 oz Butterscotch pudding or pie filling (package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a bundt pan with vegetable cooking spray (PAM).
2. Put the nuts in the bottom of the pan.
3. Sprinkle the dry pudding mix over the nuts.
4. Arrange the frozen bread rolls evenly over the pudding.
5. Mix together the sugar, cinnamon, salt, and butter.
6. Pour the mixture over the top of the rolls.
7. Cover and refrigerate overnight or cover and place in a draft-free place until the rolls thaw and rise to the top of the pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until the top is a deep golden brown.
9. Cool for 5 minutes.
10. Invert and serve.
